positive: A central, symmetrical, highly detailed celestial and botanical composition. Incorporate stylized elements such as crescent moons, swirling nebulae, delicate fern fronds, and bioluminescent flowers, all intertwined into a continuous tapestry. The design must utilize a strong, clean line art aesthetic, reminiscent of vintage tattoo flash or elegant engraving. Use a sophisticated deep sapphire blue and muted gold foil color palette to achieve maximum contrast and depth. Centered composition, perfectly balanced, suitable for a full chest graphic or apparel print, intricate silhouette, highly scalable.
negative: blur, grain, text, logo, signature, watermark, dirty, noise, jpeg artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, deformed, messy, childish, low detail, cropped, poorly drawn
